cnn1d.notes: num_layers is the number of dilated conv BLOCKS, not recurrent layers - it sets the receptive field: 1 + (kernel-1) * sum(2^i) = 125 frames at 5 blocks (dilations 1,2,4,8,16), which matches MAX_SEQ_LEN=128. At 2 blocks it collapses to 13 frames, far too short to see a whole sign; that is what produced the ~0.54 runs on 2026-07-19.
